pages.title: Tide Pearl
pages.text: A remnant of drowning pressure, battlefield control, and ownership of the deep. It begins as underwater survival and ends by making water itself hostile to your enemies.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants water breathing, underwater sight, underwater speed, and softer blows from aquatic creatures. Fire is far more dangerous to the bearer.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Drowning no longer matters, and attacking while submerged or fighting through rain becomes more rewarding. The Pearl begins turning survival into offense.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): Underwater, nearby enemies are slowed, weakened, and dragged downward. Strikes can also waterlog foes even outside a full aura.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Rain and water start sustaining the bearer, and a timed ward can blunt heavy incoming hits.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): Fire loses its special advantage, a drowning aura surrounds the bearer, and heavily armored foes can be blasted upward.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The Pearl grants Conduit Power underwater and can outright execute weakened prey caught beneath its pressure.
